name: multi-display
description: RH-2 (Qualia 2026-05-14): renderer-hardening multi-display sweep. Loads the minimal sample (examples/minimal/.qualia, 9 nodes) and screenshots it under a sweep of perf/viewer/theme variants so the team can compare side-by-side and pick common-sense defaults visually. Composite grid output is a follow-up post-processing step in the Qualia repo's scripts/.
